uly 18 2008 CONTENTS IAR Products for Classes IAR Licenses IAR Products for Classes ------------------------ IAR Embedded Workbench is installed in 140 Cory for use by EE100 (http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~ee100). IAR Embedded Workbench i

.berkeley.edu/~ee100). IAR Embedded Workbench is a set of development tools for building and debugging embedded system applications using assembler, C and C++. It includes a project manager, editor, build tools and the C-SPY debugger. I

editor, build tools and the C-SPY debugger. It is from IAR Systems (http://www.iar.com/). It includes these products: MSP 430 ("EW430V411B") ARM ("EWARM v511") PIC ("EWPIC18V310A") AVR ("EWAVRV511B") 8051 ("EW8051V750A") IAR Licenses

EWAVRV511B") 8051 ("EW8051V750A") IAR Licenses ------------ Licenses are installed on individual workstations in the EECS instructional and BWRC research labs. It does not use a network license server. (Contacts are ferenc@eecs and inst@e

ense server. (Contacts are ferenc@eecs and inst@eecs). There are free 30-day evaluation editions of IAR Systems software, available from http://www.iar.com/downloads. Instructional & Electronics Support Groups inst@eecs.berkeley.e
ctronics Support Groups inst@eecs.berkeley.edu (378 Cory, 333 Soda) esg@eecs.berkeley.edu (377 Cory)
